calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joseph Nicholson, Esq.(415-981-7210)
WALKUP, MELODIA, KELLY & SCHOENBERGER
Attorney for Plaintiff/Appellant MARY KEARNEY

Christopher B. Whitman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-4240)
OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY
Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Hearing on Plaintiff's request of award pending appeal.

The Court hears argument on behalf of the plaintiff's counsel, Mr. Nicholson.

The Court hears argument from counsel on behalf of defendent, Mr. Whitman.

The Court denies request to strike $112.50 for service of process on plaintiff's counsel and instructs counsel to add its requested language regarding staying payment of fee of costs pending appeal.

JUDGE: John K. Stewart, CLERK: Sylvia Java, Not reported, (504).
